'''thalama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumologist|pneumologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumologist|pneumologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thalama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thælæmæth|thælæmæth]] || [[word:thælæmæj|thælæmæj]] || [[word:thælæmæsh|thælæmæsh]] || [[word:thælæmæ|thælæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thalalamath|thalalamath]] || [[word:thalalamaj|thalalamaj]] || [[word:thalalamash|thalalamash]] || [[word:thalalama|thalalama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalamath|thalamath]] || [[word:thalamaj|thalamaj]] || [[word:thalamash|thalamash]] || [[word:thalama|thalama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalafmath|thalafmath]] || [[word:thalafmaj|thalafmaj]] || [[word:thalafmash|thalafmash]] || [[word:thalafmaf|thalafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thalamatha|thalamatha]] || [[word:thalamaja|thalamaja]] || [[word:thalamasha|thalamasha]] || [[word:thalamaka|thalamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thalamath|thalamath]] || [[word:thalamaj|thalamaj]] || [[word:thalamash|thalamash]] || [[word:thalama|thalama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thalamathal|thalamathal]] || [[word:thalamajal|thalamajal]] || [[word:thalamashal|thalamashal]] || [[word:thalamakal|thalamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thalamathatha|thalamathatha]] || [[word:thalamajaja|thalamajaja]] || [[word:thalamashasha|thalamashasha]] || [[word:thalamaka|thalamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thalamathan|thalamathan]] || [[word:thalamajan|thalamajan]] || [[word:thalamashan|thalamashan]] || [[word:thalamakan|thalamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thalamathaoro|thalamathaoro]] || [[word:thalamajaoro|thalamajaoro]] || [[word:thalamashaoro|thalamashaoro]] || [[word:thalamakaoro|thalamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
